# Project Aurora

Building an AI-powered analytics platform for Startup Inc.

## Background
Startup Inc wants to add AI capabilities to their existing analytics product.
We're designing and implementing an ML-powered insights engine.

## Scope
- Machine learning model development
- Real-time inference infrastructure
- Integration with existing analytics dashboard
- A/B testing framework

## Status: Planning Phase
Currently in discovery and architecture design. Implementation begins Q2 2025.

## Key Decisions
- Model training: PyTorch with AWS SageMaker
- Inference: AWS Lambda for cost efficiency
- Feature store: Feast
- Monitoring: MLflow + custom dashboards

## Budget
Contract value: $500,000 over 6 months
